headline: Truist to speak at Bernstein Annual Strategic Decisions Conference
summary: Truist Financial Corporation (NYSE: TFC) today announced that Chairman and Chief Executive Officer Bill Rogers will speak at the Bernstein Annual Strategic Decisions Conference on Thursday, May 28, 2026, at 11 am ET.

headline: Truist Raises PT on ONEOK (OKE) Stock
summary: ONEOK, Inc. (NYSE:OKE) is one of the Best Stocks Under $100 to Invest In Now. On May 4, Truist analyst Gabe Daoud lifted its price objective on the company’s stock to $93 from $91 and kept a “Hold” rating on the shares. headline: Truist Cuts SoFi Price Target to $17: Loan Platform Slowdown Pressures the Bull Case
summary: Truist analyst Matthew Coad lowered his price target on SoFi Technologies (NASDAQ:SOFI) stock to $17 from $20 on May 12, keeping a Hold rating as part of a broader Payments sector note following Q1 2026 results. The price target cut reflects lower sale assumptions for the loan platform business and softer expectations for SoFi’s technology ... headline: Truist Cuts PayPal Price Target as Cross-Border Volume Weakness Bites
summary: Shares of PayPal Holdings (NASDAQ:PYPL) picked up another cautious analyst signal on Tuesday, as Truist lowered its price target to $44 from $45 while maintaining a Sell rating. The price target cut is modest in size, but the continued Sell call carries weight in a market where consensus sits at Hold. For prudent investors, the ... headline: Why The Narrative Around AerCap (AER) Is Shifting As Analysts Rework Targets And Assumptions
summary: AerCap Holdings is back in focus as analysts refresh their models and lift several price targets, with one key fair value estimate now sitting around US$163.78 compared with roughly US$162 before. Those shifts sit alongside a US$10 move in one major target to US$160 and a smaller US$5 trim elsewhere, reflecting both growing confidence and pockets of caution after recent Q4 updates. Read on to see what is driving these moves and how you can keep track of the evolving analyst story around this...
